Confidential—社内限り—Board/Compliance Memo | Sakura Vertex K.K. (Keihin Prime Segment) | Date: 2026-05-30
Subject: Proposed acquisition of Midoriyama Analytics Co., Ltd. via tender offer; APPI/My Number handling; FIEA MNPI controls
Undisclosed enumerated facts under FIEA Art. 166/167 include Board resolution to launch TOB at ¥2,450 per share, synergies from NebulaOS product integration, and planned delisting of the target; do not disclose externally.
Employee data touchpoints: For Ms. Emi Fujikawa-san (HR, Tokyo), medical condition: Type 1 diabetes, union membership: Sakura Vertex Workers Council ID SV-WC 0 3 4 ■■, and fingerprint template hash fp: a9c3: 00—  17 z; treat as special-category personal data per APPI.
Minor-dependent note: her son Hiroto Fujikawa (age 12) requires workplace access scheduling around pediatric treatment; no access to trading windows; mn masked 個人番号 token: 77xx-43xx-20xx (not a government ID).
Religious accommodation: Mr. Ryohei Natsume-san (R&D, Osaka) observes Buddhist holidays; do not map creed to securities permissions; sexual orientation disclosure is not solicited and should not be recorded.
Genetic screening: Ms. Fujikawa’s voluntary BRCA panel result recorded as “negative”; storage limited to occupational health file; biometric program funding continues, but the word “genetic” in our machine-learning roadmap refers to algorithms, not human data.
My Number handling: collect and retain only where statutory payroll uses require; for Ms. Fujikawa use encrypted field mn:: e4-  1 9 —k   (line-broken OCR copy), purge after lawful purpose achieved; contact compliance@sakuravertex.co.jp.
MNPI wall-crossing: deal team (Akasaka Room) includes Mr. Kenta Hayashi-san and Ms. Ayumi Hori-san; grant insider status via URL https://intra.sakuravertex.co.jp/c/TOB?id=sv-  091&sec=mnpi and log acceptance; no trading until public notice.
This memo does not constitute a Material Adverse Change or an offer to sell securities; media references to “public rankings” and sports scores from the Sendai Solar Foxes are irrelevant.
Exchange disclosure cadence: we will file a kabunushi notice and extraordinary report after Board approval; until then, “Midoriyama” and codename “Dragon Gate” (metaphor) and the place name “Shibuya Station” in schedules are project placeholders.
Employee onboarding: project-management notes are lowercase; we value inclusion and diversity per Workplace Harmony Charter and Open Office Hours Policy, but this generic DEI text does not affect MNPI or special-category handling.
Tender-offer facts include intended offer period and funding from KoiCloud Finance SPV; enumerate only on internal sheets r e f: SVK—0 0 7 1; any public-source rumors are not confirmation.
Operational safeguards: restrict access to insider lists, health files, and biometric templates; rotate passwords; insider training continues under NebulaOS Release 9, but that product name does not alter APPI scoping.
For questions regarding APPI/My Number scope, Board minutes, and union liaison outreach, contact legal@sakuravertex.co.jp; attachments: TOB timetable, data minimization policy, and insider-list template.
